name: Mitarashi Anko
description: Once a student of Orochimaru and a bearer of the Cursed Seal of Heaven, Anko is now a special Jounin who oversees the second portion of the Chuunin exams.
requirement: Mission: The Survivor of the Seal

skills.name: Dual Pin
skills.description: Anko deals 5 affliction damage to one enemy permanently. Until that enemy is killed, they will receive an additional 5 damage from all Anko's other skills. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Dragon Fire'.

skills.name: Twin Snakes
skills.description: Anko delivers a large dose of poison, dealing 15 affliction damage to one random enemy. For 1 turn, Anko becomes invulnerable to physical skills. The following turn, Anko's skills will cost 1 less random chakra.

skills.name: Hidden Shadow Snake Hand
skills.description: Anko calls forth snakes from under her jacket which slam into one enemy, dealing 20 damage and *15 affliction damage to them. Afterwards, Anko gains 5 permanent destructible defense.

skills.name: Quick Reflexes
skills.description: This skill makes Mitarashi Anko invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dragon Fire
skills.description: Anko scorches the battlefield with fire, dealing 10 affliction damage to one enemy and 5 affliction damage to all others for 2 turns. During this time, they will also receive an additional 5 affliction damage from all other affliction skills. This skill ends when Akon dies.
